---
pagetitle: "User guide"
---

# User guide

These user guides provide a more in-depth look at each topic compared to the corresponding tutorials.

:::{.callout-note}
You can download these tutorials as Jupyter notebooks to run them locally. Look for the download button at the top of each tutorial.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## Running tutorials locally

To run these tutorials locally:

1. Clone the Starsim repository
2. Install Starsim and its dependencies
3. Navigate to the `docs/user_guide` folder
4. Launch Jupyter: `jupyter lab`
:::

## Introduction

- [Introduction to Starsim](user_guide/intro_starsim.qmd)
- [Starsim models](user_guide/intro_models.qmd)

## Basics

- [Understanding the model](user_guide/basics_model.qmd)
- [The Sim object](user_guide/basics_sim.qmd)
- [Parameter configuration](user_guide/basics_parameters.qmd)

## Modules

- [Diseases](user_guide/modules_diseases.qmd)
- [Networks](user_guide/modules_networks.qmd)
- [Demographics](user_guide/modules_demographics.qmd)
- [Interventions](user_guide/modules_interventions.qmd)
- [Analyzers](user_guide/modules_analyzers.qmd)
- [Connectors](user_guide/modules_connectors.qmd)

## Workflows

- [Running simulations](user_guide/workflows_run.qmd)
- [SIR Calibration](user_guide/workflows_sir_calibration.qmd)
- [Calibration](user_guide/workflows_calibration.qmd)
- [Deployment](user_guide/workflows_deploy.qmd)
- [Working with samples](user_guide/workflows_samples.qmd)

## Advanced topics

- [Time handling](user_guide/advanced_time.qmd)
- [Indexing and arrays](user_guide/advanced_indexing.qmd)
- [Probability distributions](user_guide/advanced_distributions.qmd)
- [Random number generation](user_guide/advanced_random.qmd)
- [Profiling and optimization](user_guide/advanced_profiling.qmd)
- [Nonstandard usage](user_guide/advanced_nonstandard.qmd)
